title: Better bottles
description: This rp changes all vanilla bottles to "Create" and "Farmer's delight" textures or something like them
body:
# It is just texture pack for new bottles
I took some textures from **_Create mod_** and **_farmer's delight mod_** and remake them for dragon's breath, honey and etc.
This mod also should work this mods that use classic minecraft bottle texture.

**If you find any visual bugs, please report them to me on GitHub or Discord (In the future).**
